mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_requirement ( requirement_code, requirement_name, requirement_desc, requirement_type, data_fields, data_volume, data_format, priority, status, user_id, user_name, organ_id, organ_name, start_date, end_date, remark, is_del ) VALUES ( #{requirementCode}, #{requirementName}, #{requirementDesc}, #{requirementType}, #{dataFields}, #{dataVolume}, #{dataFormat}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{organId}, #{organName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{remark}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE data_requirement
requirement_name = #{requirementName}, requirement_desc = #{requirementDesc}, requirement_type = #{requirementType}, data_fields = #{dataFields}, data_volume = #{dataVolume}, data_format = #{dataFormat}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE data_requirement SET is_del = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_requirement WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
SELECT * FROM data_requirement WHERE requirement_code = #{requirementCode} AND is_del = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE data_requirement SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0

UPDATE data_requirement_config
config_value = #{configValue}, config_desc = #{configDesc}, config_type = #{configType}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE data_requirement_config SET is_del = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_requirement_config WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
SELECT * FROM data_requirement_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND is_del = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE data_requirement_config SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_requirement_config WHERE is_enabled = 1 AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY config_type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_requirement_match ( requirement_id, resource_id, match_score, match_status, match_type, match_details, remark, is_del ) VALUES ( #{requirementId}, #{resourceId}, #{matchScore}, #{matchStatus}, #{matchType}, #{matchDetails}, #{remark}, 0 )

INSERT INTO data_requirement_match ( requirement_id, resource_id, match_score, match_status, match_type, match_details, remark, is_del ) VALUES
(#{item.requirementId}, #{item.resourceId}, #{item.matchScore}, #{item.matchStatus}, #{item.matchType}, #{item.matchDetails}, #{item.remark}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE data_requirement_match
match_score = #{matchScore}, match_status = #{matchStatus}, match_type = #{matchType}, match_details = #{matchDetails}, confirm_user_id = #{confirmUserId}, confirm_user_name = #{confirmUserName}, confirm_date = #{confirmDate}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE data_requirement_match SET is_del = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, dr.requirement_name, d.resource_name FROM data_requirement_match m LEFT JOIN data_requirement dr ON m.requirement_id = dr.id AND dr.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN data_resource d ON m.resource_id = d.resource_id AND d.is_del = 0 WHERE m.id = #{id} AND m.is_del = 0

SELECT m.*, dr.requirement_name, d.resource_name FROM data_requirement_match m LEFT JOIN data_requirement dr ON m.requirement_id = dr.id AND dr.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN data_resource d ON m.resource_id = d.resource_id AND d.is_del = 0 WHERE m.requirement_id = #{requirementId} AND m.is_del = 0 ORDER BY m.match_score DESC

SELECT m.*, dr.requirement_name, d.resource_name FROM data_requirement_match m LEFT JOIN data_requirement dr ON m.requirement_id = dr.id AND dr.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN data_resource d ON m.resource_id = d.resource_id AND d.is_del = 0 WHERE m.resource_id = #{resourceId} AND m.is_del = 0 ORDER BY m.match_score DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE data_requirement_match SET match_status = #{matchStatus}, confirm_user_id = #{confirmUserId}, confirm_user_name = #{confirmUserName}, confirm_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE data_requirement_match SET is_del = 1 WHERE requirement_id = #{requirementId}
